name: Ass Beeter! (pistol)
description: A Bandit pistol fitted with a Jakobs barrel, giving it stronger damage and better accuracy than a more typical Bandit sidearm. The slower fire rate and heavier kick make rapid follow-up shots less forgiving, so it is best used for deliberate, well-placed hits.
notes: It spawns at green rarity or higher and is most commonly found as a standard world drop.
